calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Jcc Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner's motion to compel answers to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Peitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories; Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Declaration
Off Calendar Apr-13-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents. The motion is ordered off calendar. The proof of service indicates that the motion was not sent to the last address of record in Fairfax, California. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
